purpose: Real-data PathNet stress tests for centric-feature quality and graph-prior quality.

covid.label_definition: cov == Yes and ICU Yes vs No; ICU Yes encoded as 1
covid.preprocessing: PathNet data_preprocessing with match_tol_ppm=9, zero_threshold=0.75, scale=True.

brca.label_definition: ER_Status_nature2012 non-missing labels; Positive encoded as 1 and all other non-missing labels encoded as 0, matching example_gene.ipynb.
brca.preprocessing: Network-gene and miRNA filtering follow example_gene.ipynb; no external StandardScaler is applied.

notes: Preprocessing and labels follow the existing real_data_pathnet.py benchmark loaders.
Stress conditions keep training hyperparameters fixed and alter only targets or graph/connection priors.
Low-signal centric features are ranked using training-split univariate effect scores to avoid test leakage.
These are real-data stability experiments and do not provide ground-truth subnetwork recovery metrics.
